emails.subject: Re: Global Contracts Meeting
emails.body: Re: Global Contracts Meeting Per conv. w/Anthony, we should expect 13 people. We do not need to teleconference anyone in. Anthony wanted the London Global Contracts people on the line, but I discussed it with Mark, and their forms and legal issues are so different from ours that I told Anthony that they need to contact London Legal if they would like a presentation.

emails.subject: Re: Global Contracts Meeting
emails.body: Re: Global Contracts Meeting What time do you want me to say the meeting is going to start and end? I need to send a reminder email with the location, time, etc.
